description.ko: 디지털 공간을 가로지르는 음파의 유동적인 움직임을 포착하여, 보이지 않는 음향의 에너지를 시각적으로 구현한 매혹적인 작품입니다.
description.en: A mesmerizing visualization of sonic energy, capturing the fluid movement of sound waves as they ripple through a digital void, representing the unseen power of acoustics.

prompt: ECHO-0 sound visualization, abstract digital landscape of pulsating audio waves, glowing neon cyan and violet frequencies, 3D parametric oscillations, cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed textures, rhythmic patterns, synthwave aesthetic, 8k resolution, minimalist dark background
